scenario.name: UAC Register with Auth UE5
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:001010000000005@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:001010000000005@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:001010000000005@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 300 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:001010000000005@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:001010000000005@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:001010000000005@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 300 [authentication username=001010000000005 password=465B5CE8B199B49FAA5F0A2EE238A6BC] Content-Length: 0
